pi_items.source: prep_station_config.txt explicitly instructs setting the font size to Very Large, which corresponds to a default_font_size of 24 in Chrome, as verified by verifier.py logic.
prep_station_config.txt explicitly instructs setting the default download location to /home/ga/Documents/HACCP_Logs.
prep_station_config.txt explicitly instructs setting startup pages to https://www.sysco.com and https://www.servsafe.com.
prep_station_config.txt explicitly instructs adding search shortcuts with keywords usda and recipe.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Chrome profile data and a configuration text file injected via setup_task.sh. The expected Chrome font size for Very Large is 24. The target download directory is explicitly defined as /home/ga/Documents/HACCP_Logs. The target startup pages are sysco.com and servsafe.com, and the expected custom search engine keywords are usda and recipe, exactly matching the instructions in prep_station_config.txt and the verifier.py evaluation logic.
